recipes.name: Pantry scramble
recipes.steps: Whisk eggs with milk. Wilt spinach in butter. Pour in eggs and stir until just set.

recipes.name: Tomato pasta
recipes.steps: Boil pasta. Soften tomatoes in olive oil. Toss together and finish with parmesan.

recipes.name: Spinach omelette
recipes.steps: Beat eggs. Cook spinach in butter, add eggs, fold with parmesan.

recipes.name: Lemonade pancakes
recipes.steps: Whisk flour and milk. Add lemonade for lift. Cook on buttered pan until golden.

recipes.name: Roast chicken dinner
recipes.steps: Rub chicken with oil and rosemary. Roast with potatoes until cooked through.

recipes.name: Garlic butter rice
recipes.steps: Soften diced onion and garlic in butter. Stir in rice, add water, simmer covered until tender.

recipes.name: Chickpea tomato stew
recipes.uses: canned chickpeas, tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil
recipes.steps: Fry onion and garlic in olive oil. Add chopped tomatoes and chickpeas. Simmer 15 minutes and season.

recipes.name: Soy chicken stir-fry
recipes.uses: chicken thighs, carrots, garlic, soy sauce, rice
recipes.steps: Cook rice. Stir-fry sliced chicken until browned, add carrots and garlic, splash in soy sauce, serve over rice.

recipes.name: Carrot ribbon salad
recipes.steps: Peel carrots into ribbons. Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

recipes.name: Yogurt pancakes
recipes.uses: flour, greek yogurt, eggs, milk, butter
recipes.steps: Whisk yogurt, eggs, and milk. Fold in flour. Cook ladlefuls on a buttered pan until golden on both sides.

recipes.name: Spinach rice pilaf
recipes.steps: Sweat onion in butter. Toast rice briefly, add water, simmer. Stir spinach through at the end.

recipes.name: Pasta carbonara
recipes.steps: Boil pasta. Crisp pancetta. Off heat, toss pasta with beaten eggs, parmesan, and a little pasta water.
